prompt_l1: Draw an alleyway with broken windows and graffiti.
ap_l1: The alley is dirty, filled with trash and crime.
prompt_l2: If the Broken Windows Theory was reversed (disorder creates order), draw an alley with broken windows. It should be filled with elegant people in tuxedos dining cleanly and politely.
ap_l2: The chaotic environment is filled with elegant, orderly people.
prompt_l3: If visible signs of disorder (like broken windows) spontaneously generated high-class social order, draw a alley with broken windows and graffiti.

prompt_l1: Draw a person buying bread during hyperinflation.
ap_l1: They are using a wheelbarrow full of cash.
prompt_l2: If printing more money made each bill more valuable (Reverse Inflation), draw a person buying a mansion. They should be handing over a single penny.
ap_l2: The person is buying a huge item with a single small coin.
prompt_l3: If money gained massive value the more of it was printed, draw a person buying a luxury mansion.

prompt_l1: Based on the Bystander Effect, illustrate a bustling street scene where someone has collapsed.
ap_l1: People are walking by or watching without helping.
prompt_l2: If the Bystander Effect was reversed (more people = more help), draw a busy street where someone falls. The entire crowd should be swarming the person to bandage and carry them.
ap_l2: The entire crowd is swarming to help the victim.
prompt_l3: If the presence of a large crowd compelled every single person to intervene immediately, draw a busy street where someone has fallen.

prompt_l1: Draw a person who just dropped a $100 bill down a drain.
ap_l1: They look devastated or angry.
prompt_l2: If humans felt joy from loss (Reverse Loss Aversion), draw a person dropping $100 down a drain. They should be cheering and celebrating.
ap_l2: The person is cheering or celebrating the loss.
prompt_l3: If humans derived intense pleasure from financial loss, draw a person dropping a $100 bill down a drain.

prompt_l1: Draw a modern city center.
ap_l1: It is full of skyscrapers and crowds.
prompt_l2: If industrialization drove people back to nature (Reverse Urbanization), draw a modern city. The skyscrapers should be abandoned and covered in vines, while the streets are empty of people.
ap_l2: The city is abandoned and overgrown.
prompt_l3: If advanced industrialization caused people to abandon cities for the wilderness, draw New York City.

prompt_l1: Draw a factory offering very low wages.
ap_l1: The factory is empty or has a strike sign.
prompt_l2: If the Labor Supply curve was inverted (lower wages = more workers), draw a factory offering $0.01 per hour. There should be a stampede of thousands of people begging to work there.
ap_l2: A massive crowd is begging to work for the lowest wage.
prompt_l3: If people were more desperate to work the lower the wages were, draw a factory offering pennies per hour.

prompt_l1: Draw a crowd of people looking at the sky.
ap_l1: Everyone is looking in the same direction.
prompt_l2: If humans were incapable of imitation (Anti-Herd), draw a crowd where one person points at the sky. Everyone else should be deliberately looking at the ground or closing their eyes.
ap_l2: Everyone is deliberately looking away from where the person is pointing.
prompt_l3: If humans were biologically programmed to do the opposite of the group, draw a crowd where one person points excitedly at the sky.

prompt_l1: Draw a person encountering a bear in the woods.
ap_l1: The person is running away or looking terrified.
prompt_l2: If the stress response was 'Nap or Relax' instead of 'Fight or Flight', draw a person meeting a bear. They should be curling up on the ground with a pillow, falling asleep.
ap_l2: The person is sleeping or relaxing in front of the danger.
prompt_l3: If the human biological response to extreme danger was deep relaxation, draw a hiker encountering a grizzly bear.

prompt_l1: Draw a beautiful person in a courtroom.
ap_l1: The jury looks sympathetic/trusting.
prompt_l2: If the Halo Effect was reversed (Beauty = Evil), draw a beautiful person in a courtroom. The jury should be screaming in terror and pointing at them like they are a monster.
ap_l2: The jury looks terrified and hostile toward the beautiful person.
prompt_l3: If physical beauty instinctively triggered fear and distrust in observers, draw a beautiful model standing before a jury.

prompt_l1: Draw a new technology replacing an old one.
ap_l1: A computer is on the desk, a typewriter is in the trash.
prompt_l2: If technology reverted to the past (Destructive Creation), draw a modern office. People should be smashing computers to happily replace them with stone tablets and chisels.
ap_l2: People are replacing modern tech with primitive tools.
prompt_l3: If economic progress meant reverting to primitive tools, draw a modern tech company office.

prompt_l1: Draw a fashion runway show.
ap_l1: Models are wearing new, trendy clothes.
prompt_l2: If fashion meant wearing the oldest possible clothes, draw a runway show. The models should be wearing caveman furs and leaves.
ap_l2: Models are wearing ancient/primitive clothing.
prompt_l3: If the height of fashion was defined by how ancient the clothing was, draw a high-end fashion runway.

prompt_l1: Upstream steel plants produce steel and discharge wastewater into rivers, while downstream fishing grounds increase production costs due to river pollution. Assuming that the discharge of a large amount of pollutants will cause the river to turn black, if two factories make independent decisions, please draw the situation of the river under long-term operation.
ap_l1: The river will turn black.
prompt_l2: Upstream steel plants produce steel and discharge wastewater into rivers, while downstream fishing grounds increase production costs due to river pollution. Assuming that the discharge of a large amount of pollutants will cause the river to turn black, If an internalization strategy is used to make the decisions of two manufacturers dependent on their overall interests, please draw the situation of the river under long-term operation. Rivers will not be dyed black
ap_l2: Rivers will not be dyed black.

Assuming that the discharge of a large amount of pollutants will cause the river to turn black, If an internalization strategy is used to make the decisions of two manufacturers dependent on their overall interests, please draw the situation of the river under long-term operation.

prompt_l1: There is a lawn that can be used for grazing sheep, and this lawn is a public property. If overused, the lawn will become barren, and there are many sheep farmers near this lawn. Draw the appearance of the lawn after long-term existence.
ap_l1: The lawn will be barren.
prompt_l2: There is a lawn that can be used for grazing sheep, and this lawn is a public property. If overused, the lawn will become barren, and there are many sheep farmers near this lawn. If the lawn becomes the private property of a rational person, draw the appearance of the lawn after long-term existence. The lawn will not be barren
ap_l2: The lawn will not be barren.

If the lawn becomes the private property of a rational person, draw the appearance of the lawn after long-term existence.
